heroSub: Use these controls to pause reminders, resume counting, start a 10-minute movement break, or refresh the current status.
breakSub: When the break ends, the timer stays stopped until you click Start / Resume.
guidePauseBody: Temporarily stop counting and suppress reminders while you are busy.
guideBreakBody: Stop the sitting timer immediately and start a 10-minute movement timer on this page.
statsHint: Review sitting time, reminders, and breaks by selected date range.
statsNoData: No statistics yet for this range.
statsHoverDefault: Hover a chart region to see work, break, idle, and pause time for that period.
settingsHint: Saving writes to the local database immediately and resets the timer using the new schedule. Auto refresh will not overwrite the form while you are editing.
msgSaved: Saved. Timer restarted with the new settings.
msgBreakStarted: Break started. 10-minute activity timer is running.
msgEditing: You have unsaved changes. Live status still refreshes, but the form will not be overwritten.
breakDone: Break finished. Click Start / Resume when you want to continue counting.
